description: Garage logs-archive (compact.py 出力 Parquet) を DuckDB datasource 経由で集計する RouterOS 長期ログダッシュボード。Loki retention を超える 30/90 日範囲が対象。json 列スキーマ (1 列, JSON 型) を json->>'field' で展開する。

targets.rawSql:
SELECT count(*) AS cnt
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=routeros/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)

SELECT
  time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 hour', (json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP) AS time,
  count(*) AS cnt
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=routeros/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 1 時間 bucket 件数推移

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  coalesce(json->>'host', '(unknown)') AS host,
  count(*) AS cnt
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=routeros/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  coalesce(json->>'level', json->>'severity', '(none)') AS level,
  count(*) AS cnt
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=routeros/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT
  (json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP AS ts,
  json->>'host'                  AS host,
  json->>'level'                 AS level,
  json->>'message'               AS message
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=routeros/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 200

title: RouterOS Long-term Logs (DuckDB)
